title: Let's Go Gambling!
description: A mod that adds several types of coins to gamble for effects and items, with risk involved!
body:
# Let's Go Gambling!

A thrilling mod that introduces a risky, yet rewarding gambling system through flipping coins. See how far your luck will take you by challenging the odds with different tiers of coins, each offering unique risk-reward opportunities!

## What This Mod Adds

- **8 Tiers of Coins**: Dirt, Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Emerald, Diamond, and Netherite Coins
- **Dynamic Streak System**: Consecutive wins increase rewards but also raise the stakes
- **Risk & Reward Mechanics**:
  - **Successful Gambles**:
    - Gain positive status effects
    - Receive valuable items based on coin tier
    - Build up winning streaks for better rewards
  - **Failed Gambles**:
    - Lose valuable items matching the coin's tier
    - Receive negative status effects
    - Risk of coin destruction
    - Chance to spawn hostile mobs
    - Possible loss of entire inventory at high streaks

## Important Information

- Coins can be reset by using them on blocks to clear streaks, and doesn't clear the rewards
- Higher tier coins offer better success rates but riskier failures
- Gambling streaks persist until broken by failure or manual reset
- Use at your own risk - high streaks can lead to devastating losses!
